summary: CI ran many tests successfully, but the job failed late when the 'format' recipe exited with code 127, causing the 'gen-all' recipe to fail.

evidence.quote: test result: ok. 2525 passed; 0 failed; 0 ignored; 0 measured; 0 filtered out; finished in 4.78s
evidence.reason: Shows the test suite ran and many tests passed before the later failure.

evidence.quote: error: Recipe `format` failed on line 221 with exit code 127
evidence.reason: Directly reports the failing recipe and the exit code (127) that caused the job to fail.

evidence.quote: error: Recipe `gen-all` failed on line 32 with exit code 127
evidence.reason: Shows that the higher-level 'gen-all' recipe also failed as a consequence of the 'format' failure.

suggested_fix: Inspect the 'format' recipe (around line 221) to determine which command returned exit code 127 (127 commonly means 'command not found'). Ensure the formatter or required tool is installed and available in PATH in the CI job (or modify the workflow to install the tool before running the 'format' recipe).
